name: OpenRealm Advantage Kit
purpose: A working product and architecture starter kit for an AI-native, open-source voxel world creator.

contents.studio: Dependency-free browser prototype for Creator Studio.
contents.python_kernel: Reusable deterministic planning kernel with tests and CLI.
contents.luanti_mod: Drop-in Luanti prototype for planning, approval, and undo.
contents.schemas: Build plan, world recipe, and audit event schemas.
contents.docs: Product thesis, Nova architecture, creator flow, integration plan, 30-day plan.
contents.assets: Brand, UI, architecture, roadmap, and key art images.
